title: chloris elegans
intro: Chloris elegans, also known as green orchard grass, is a type of grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. Chloris elegans can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
